title: Boto3 operations that support pagination should be performed using paginators or manual pagination handling
description: This rule checks if Boto3 operations that support pagination are not using paginators or manual pagination handling.
message: Boto3 operation with pagination not using paginator or manual pagination handling.
recommendation: Use Boto3 paginators or implement manual pagination handling.

noncompliant.description: Listing S3 buckets without using paginator.

why_is_this_an_issue: Using pagination improperly can lead to performance issues and data inconsistencies.
how_to_fix: Use Boto3 paginators or implement manual pagination handling.
